title: elaeocarpus forbesii subsp. forbesii
intro: Elaeocarpus forbesii subsp. forbesii, also known as the Forbes' blueberry ash, is a plant species that belongs to the Elaeocarpaceae family. This plant is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Elaeocarpus forbesii subsp. forbesii include its potential to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and pneumonia. In herbal preparations, the leaves and fruits of the plant are often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures that can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
